class.name: GDKTitleStorage
class.brief_description: Xbox Services Title Storage service accessed via GDK.title_storage.
class.description: Wraps Xbox Services Title Storage quota, metadata listing, download, upload, and delete APIs. Methods return one-shot completion [Signal] values that emit [GDKResult].

method.name: get_quota_async
method.description: Queries quota for [param storage_type]. On success, [member GDKResult.data] is a [Dictionary] with [code]used_bytes[/code] and [code]quota_bytes[/code].

method.name: list_blob_metadata_async
method.description: Lists blob metadata. On success, [member GDKResult.data] is a [GDKTitleStorageBlobMetadataResult].

method.name: get_next_blob_metadata_async
method.description: Fetches the next page for a metadata result that has [method GDKTitleStorageBlobMetadataResult.has_next].

method.name: download_blob_async
method.description: Downloads a blob. The service first queries matching metadata so the native blob type and length are used. On success, [member GDKResult.data] is a [Dictionary] with [code]metadata[/code] and [code]data[/code].

method.name: upload_blob_async
method.description: Uploads bytes using binary blob metadata. On success, [member GDKResult.data] is the uploaded [GDKTitleStorageBlobMetadata].

method.name: delete_blob_async
method.description: Deletes a binary blob. [param match_condition] supports [code]not_used[/code] and [code]if_match[/code].
